message:
fix: clean up process-global state on last connection close

GROUP_COMMIT_QUEUES and PARALLEL_WAL_COORDINATORS retained stale
epoch/db_size state across sequential Connection lifecycles to different
files, causing "freelist trunk page N exceeds db_size M" errors on the
3rd+ connection open. Now both maps remove their path entry when the
last connection for that path closes, following the same pattern used
by SHARED_MVCC_STATE_BY_PATH.

Fixes #56

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
